news.headline: Regor reports 5% placebo-adjusted weight loss in Phase 2a trial for RGT-075. No severe adverse events, 4% discontinuation rate.keyupcoming Phase 2b study in the US for obesity treatment.
news.summary: Regor recently revealed the findings from its 12-week single-dose Phase 2a trial for RGT-075, an oral GLP-1RA taken once daily. Results indicated a 5% weight-loss when adjusted for the placebo, without reaching a plateau. There were no severe adverse events related to the treatment, and only 4% of participants discontinued due to adverse events, a rate matching that of the placebo group. The trial enrolled a total number of participants, showcasing promising results for the medication.

news.headline: Hilgers Graben partners secure places on Lawdragon 2025 list of top 500 US lawyers, incl  Mike Merriman, Alice LaCour, Alec Schultz, & Rose Hunter Jones.
news.summary: In Lincoln, Nebraska, Hilgers Graben, a prominent law firm specializing in commercial litigation and discovery counsel services, has recently celebrated the inclusion of four of its partners in the prestigious Lawdragon 2025 list of the 500 Leading Lawyers in America. This accolade recognizes the expertise and dedication of Mike Merriman, the firm's litigation head, along with partners Alice LaCour, Alec Schultz, and Rose Hunter Jones. Demonstrating a commitment to offering top-tier legal representation and service, the firm prioritizes having exceptionally skilled professionals on its team.

news.headline: UnitedHealth to release Q4 earnings, analysts forecast EPS at $6.75 (up from $6.16) and revenue of $101.72 billion (up from $94.43). Shares rose 2% to $524.52. Amedisys extends merger deadline with UnitedHealth.
news.summary: Minnetonka, Minnesota-based UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) is set to unveil its fourth-quarter earnings on Thursday, Jan. 16, 2025. Analysts predict earnings to reach $6.75 per share, up from $6.16 a share in the same period last year. The company is expected to report revenue of $101.72 billion for the quarter, compared to $94.43 billion in the previous year. Amedisys Inc (NASDAQ:AMED) recently announced an extension of its merger deadline with UnitedHealth Group, originally announced on June 26, 2023. UnitedHealth's shares closed at $524.52 on Wednesday, showing a 2% gain. For more details, refer to Benzinga Pro.

news.headline: Numerous online conspiracies sparked by the devastating LA fires.
loanDepot appoints Bart Evans as Regional Vice President for the Southeast, managing Alabama, Arkansas, and Tennessee.
news.summary: loanDepot, Inc. has announced the appointment of Bart Evans as the regional vice president, overseeing a Southeastern territory covering Alabama, Arkansas, and Tennessee. Evans, a former professional baseball player, brings a strong work ethic and teamwork skills to his new role. He will report to Paul Ramos, the Senior Vice President of Production at loanDepot. This move supports loanDepot's efforts to enhance its presence in key markets and strengthen its leadership team. LoanDepot, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol LDI.

news.headline: Protestors in Slovakia condemn PM's meeting with Putin, with thousands demonstrating against it.
Bank of America predicts Fed won't cut rates further, risks of hike..
news.summary: Earlier today, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 8.5%, reaching a total of 12.6 million people without jobs. This is an increase of 1.2% compared to last month, indicating a worsening economic situation. Additionally, the number of new job openings has decreased by 4.8% in the last quarter, further exacerbating the job market crisis. Experts suggest that immediate action is needed to address this concerning trend and prevent further job losses.

news.headline: InsureMyTrip warns about limits in cruise travel protection as popularity of cruising grows with newer, larger ships.
news.summary: In Warwick, Rhode Island, on January 10, 2025, it was reported that the popularity of cruising has surged to unprecedented levels. This surge can be attributed to the introduction of newer and larger ships that come equipped with extraordinary amenities, thus reinventing the travel experience for passengers. The increasing number of travelers opting for these distinctive vacations underscores the necessity for a deeper comprehension of cruise travel insurance and its intricacies.

news.headline: CuriosityStream Inc. (Nasdaq: CURI) CEO Clint Stinchcomb will join 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference on Jan. 14, 2025.
news.summary: CuriosityStream, Inc., a prominent factual entertainment company trading under Nasdaq as CURI, revealed that its President and CEO Clint Stinchcomb is set to partake in the 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference in New York on January 14, 2025. Stinchcomb will be accompanied by Needham’s Senior Entertainment and Internet Analyst Laura Martin at 2:15pm ET during the Future of Streaming panel discussion. The event will delve into a variety of category partnerships and industry insights.

news.headline: Leasing starts at Union Channel, the first Gowanus wharf building completed at 240 Third Avenue. #Brooklyn #RealEstate
news.summary: Charney Companies and Tavros Capital have unveiled their latest residential project in Brooklyn, New York. The leasing process has commenced at Union Channel, situated at 240 Third Avenue in Gowanus. This marks the opening of the first of four modern living spaces developed by the partnership.

news.headline: SodaStream introduces Tips for Sips program for Dry January, rewarding consumers for sticking to resolutions.
news.summary: SodaStream, the top brand for sparkling water makers globally, is making it easier for consumers to stick to their New Year's Resolutions with the launch of the Tips for Sips Program. The initiative, launched on January 10, 2025, aims to encourage individuals to improve their drinking habits in the coming year. With this new program, customers can look forward to greater rewards for staying committed to their resolutions.

news.headline: West-MEC in Glendale, Ariz., started a $13.5M expansion of Northeast Campus to offer more training facilities.
news.summary: In Glendale, Arizona, on January 10, 2025, Western Maricopa Education Center (West-MEC), a career technical education school district (CTED) catering to students in the West Valley, has initiated the construction of a $13.5 million expansion project at its Northeast Campus situated at 1617 W. Williams Dr.

news.headline: Nvidia's stock drops 9% from recent peak as short-term gains prevail.
Lancaster PD held swearing-in ceremony for new officers as part of community-led approach to policing on Jan 14, 2025 at 1:30 pm.
news.summary: A significant event is scheduled to take place in Lancaster, California on January 14, 2025, at 1:30 p.m. The Lancaster Police Department (LPD) is actively adopting a community-driven method to enhance public safety within the City. This initiative is part of the department's ongoing commitment to bolster law enforcement activities.

news.headline: Biden imposes significant sanctions on Russian oil in farewell move. Big implications.
e.l.f. Cosmetics sponsors girls wrestling tournament with 700 athletes, 83 teams, and 3,000 spectators. High school wrestling is growing in US.
news.summary: In Columbia, Missouri, e.l.f. Cosmetics, a subsidiary of e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE: ELF), has become the inaugural beauty sponsor of the biggest high school girls wrestling competition. The Wonder Women of Wrestling Varsity Tournament, running for its sixth year, saw participation from 700 athletes representing 83 teams and drew a crowd of 3,000 spectators. Over the course of the two-day event on January 3-4, 2025, there were a total of 1,300 matches held. Wrestling stands as the most rapidly expanding high school sport in the United States.

news.headline: IRS Free File for 2025 allows taxpayers to use industry-leading tax software for free on www.IRS.gov/FreeFile.
news.summary: Taxpayers are encouraged to electronically file their federal tax returns ahead of the official start of the tax filing season through the IRS website at www.IRS.gov/FreeFile. As of Jan. 10, 2025, individuals can begin preparing and submitting their tax returns using free federal tax preparation and e-filing software. This initiative allows taxpayers to get a jumpstart on their tax obligations and streamline the filing process.

news.headline: AI solutions for visually impaired, AI search, and AI agents win ISG Startup Challenges in Paris, Dallas, and London.
news.summary: A company based in Stamford, Connecticut, has developed AI-powered solutions aimed at assisting individuals with visual impairments. The technology has been successful in winning the ISG Startup Challenges in major cities such as Paris, Dallas, and London. The solutions focus on optimizing AI search capabilities and creating AI agents to cater to the needs of individuals with visual impairments.

news.headline: Sinclair & Tennis Channel team with Salvation Army for California wildfires relief, raising funds for aid in Los Angeles.
news.summary: Sinclair and Tennis Channel have jointly launched Sinclair Cares: California Wildfires Relief in Baltimore, Md. The initiative, in collaboration with the Salvation Army, aims to offer aid to Southern California regions impacted by the wildfires. The fundraising effort will focus on delivering essential support, such as shelter, food, water, and assistance to wildfire victims and first responders in Los Angeles. Donations to Sinclair Cares: California Wildfires Relief will be utilized to provide critical resources for those affected by the fires.

news.headline: FHLB Dallas and First Security Bank award $30K grant to Conway Ministry Center for The Refuge housing program.
news.summary: In Conway, Arkansas, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) and First Security Bank are teaming up to present a $30,000 grant to the Conway Ministry Center. The grant aims to support The Refuge, which is Arkansas’ pioneering emergency housing program catering to families with children, and individuals with disabilities or medical requirements. Specifically, the funds will contribute towards the salary of a shelter manager, ensuring the smooth operation of The Refuge and its wraparound case management services.

news.headline: Jan 31, 2025: Join the annual meeting on access to information. Don't miss out! #Transparency #Accountability
Hermès International shares liquidity contract standing as of Dec 31, 2024; full details undisclosed.
Lectra reported on the total number of shares and voting rights in its capital as of December 31, 2024.
news.summary: At the end of December 31, 2024, the company disclosed its monthly report detailing the total quantity of shares and voting rights that make up its capital. This information is crucial for investors and stakeholders as it provides transparency and insight into the company's structure and governance. By openly sharing this data, the company aims to ensure accountability and maintain trust with its shareholders. It serves as a key indicator of the company's financial health and stability, with the total number of shares and voting rights reflecting the extent of ownership and decision-making power within the organization. This disclosure enables investors to make informed decisions based on the current state of the company's capital composition.

news.headline: MimiVax and UI Pharmaceuticals collaborate to produce SurVaxM for glioblastoma treatment in new facility. Exciting progress.
news.summary: UI Pharmaceuticals has successfully manufactured SurVaxM, the inaugural drug product in their new facility. The company aims to meet the demand for increased clinical and commercial quantities. MimiVax is currently incorporating SurVaxM in a Randomized Phase 2b clinical study on glioblastoma. This development is taking place in Buffalo, New York in January.

news.headline: Babylon Labs invests in Fiamma for BitVM2 tech, aiming for trust-minimized Bitcoin bridges. Collaboration for decentralized world.
news.summary: In Tortola, British Virgin Islands, on January 10, 2025, Fiamma, a leading company in BitVM2 technology, has successfully obtained a significant investment from Babylon Labs to further the common goal of creating a Bitcoin-secured decentralized environment. The collaboration aims to enhance the software solution for this venture.

news.headline: Citizens criticize $176M legal fees awarded by Chancellor Kathaleen McCormick in Tesla case.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware, Citizens for Judicial Fairness issued a statement regarding Chancellor Kathaleen McCormick's decision to award $176 million in legal fees in the Tesla board pay case. This announcement comes shortly after Delaware received $175 million in Medicaid funding, which was praised as a significant boost to the state's program. The same amount was granted to three law firms by Chancellor McCormick, sparking discussions about the allocation of funds in legal cases.

news.headline: CUPE announces picket line locations for Edmonton job actions starting on Jan 13, 2025 at 7:30 am MST. Locations include Ross Shepard High School, M. E. LaZerte High School, and Dr. Francis Whiskeyjack High School for Local 3550, as well as all schools for Local 4625.
news.summary: CUPE Locals 3550 and 4625 have revealed the picket line locations for their upcoming job action commencing on Monday, January 13, 2025, in Edmonton, Alberta. The picket lines are scheduled to be established at 7:30 am MST. For Local 3550 (Edmonton Public), the locations include Ross Shepard High School at 13546 111 Ave NW, M. E. LaZerte High School at 6804 144 Ave NW, and Elder Dr. Francis Whiskeyjack High School at 2410 17 St NW. Whereas, Local 4625 (Sturgeon Public) will have picket lines set up at all schools. This action is part of their protest for increased education funding and smaller class sizes.

Registration opens for Info-Tech LIVE 2025 conference in Las Vegas, June 10-12, with over 3,000 IT leaders and experts.
news.summary: Registration is now open for Info-Tech Research Group's key event, Info-Tech LIVE 2025, slated for June 10–12 at The Bellagio in Las Vegas. This conference is set to unite over 3,000 IT leaders and experts to delve into practical strategies and insights centered around a specific theme.

news.headline: Toll Brothers to open luxury townhome community, Stonemill Village, at 5 Grayson Lane in Downingtown, selling begins Spring 2025.
news.summary: In Downingtown, Pennsylvania, on January 10, 2025, Toll Brothers, Inc., a prominent builder of luxury homes in the U.S. (NYSE:TOL), revealed its upcoming townhome community, Stonemill Village, located at 5 Grayson Lane in Chester County. The construction of the Sales Center and model home at this site is currently in progress, with sales expected to commence in the spring of 2025.

news.headline: Vince McMahon settles with S.E.C. for not disclosing secret payments to two women, including one alleging assault.
news.summary: Two women were paid by the former CEO of World Wrestling Entertainment, one of whom had accused him of assault.

news.headline: Argonne in Illinois will head two microelectronics projects for the U.S. Department of Energy, focusing on memory systems and device design.
news.summary: In Lemont, Illinois, analysts from Argonne will investigate cutting-edge memory systems and design strategies for microelectronic components, crucial for contemporary computing.

news.headline: Hyundai and Genesis donate $200,000 for Southern California wildfire relief efforts, launching a comprehensive program.
news.summary: Hyundai and Genesis have contributed a generous donation of $200,000 towards relief efforts in Southern California. This initiative comes as a response to the severe wildfires that have been impacting the region. The donation was announced in Fountain Valley, California, on January 10, 2025. The joint effort by Hyundai and Genesis Motor America aims to provide support and assistance to those affected by the wildfires through a comprehensive relief program.

news.headline: Cognizant CEO Ravi Kumar S receives Pravasi Bharatiya Samman Award in India. Highest accolade for overseas Indians.
news.summary: In Bhubaneswar, India, on January 10, 2025, Ravi Kumar S, CEO of Cognizant, received the revered Pravasi Bharatiya Samman Award from the Government of India for his contributions as an overseas Indian. The award is the highest recognition bestowed upon individuals outside India.

news.headline: Morgan Stanley: A March cut is still more likely than not, due to its more favorable inflation outlook.
Morgan Stanley: The US jobs report should reduce the probability of near-term Fed cuts.

Bitcoin facing resistance between $90,000 and $100,000; Analysts foresee Q1 bounce back but warn of 20% corrections amid short-term bearish trends. Promising season ahead: Q1 of 2025 expected to be profitable due to macro factors and crypto catalysts. Market conditions signal caution, advises risk management. Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) is currently facing a challenge in its price range between $90,000 and $100,000, with experts and traders showing a positive outlook for the first quarter of 2025. Seasoned crypto trader and Asymmetric Fund CEO Joe McCann expressed a short-term bearish perspective during an interview on the Blockworks macro podcast on Jan. 9. Despite recognizing the current bearish trends, McCann holds optimism for Q1 as a period historically known for profitability, attributed to various macroeconomic factors and specific catalysts within the crypto market. McCann emphasized the importance of interpreting market signals and adapting risk management strategies accordingly, noting Bitcoin's recent struggles with crucial resistance levels and a decline in ETF... (The full article is available on Benzinga.com).

news.headline: NVAR CEO Ryan McLaughlin named to Swanepoel Power 200 for 2nd year. Recognizes top industry executives.
news.summary: In Fairfax, Virginia, on January 10, 2025, it was announced that Ryan McLaughlin, CEO of the Northern Virginia Association of Realtors® (NVAR), has achieved a notable recognition. This marks his second consecutive year being listed in the Swanepoel Power 200 (SP 200), which ranks the leading executives in the residential real estate sector. The SP 200 is an esteemed ranking within the industry, highlighting influential individuals.

news.summary: In recent statistics, it has been revealed that a total of 2,500 new cases of a viral infection have been reported across the country. There has been an increase of 15% in comparison to last month's numbers. Additionally, there have been 300 new hospitalizations due to this virus, with 50 patients currently in critical condition requiring intensive care. Experts are urging the public to follow safety guidelines and regulations to help curb the spread of the infection.

news.headline: CFPB suggests crypto companies compensate users for lost funds due to breaches, aligning with bank protection rules.
news.summary: A potential rule by the CFPB may grant crypto users security akin to that of US bank account holders by redefining the concept of "funds." This could significantly impact the growing number of individuals involved in cryptocurrency transactions, offering them comparable safeguards.

news.headline: Bitcoin may have hit bottom at $92K; now at $95,000 with positive onchain metrics suggesting recovery.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin is approaching $95,000 after experiencing slight gains today, with various onchain BTC indicators suggesting a possible market bottom.

Elis acquires Wäscherei Bodensee in Switzerland in a new deal.

Summary: ResearchAndMarkets.com reports Global Agri Natural Enemy Pest Control market grew at 6.73% CAGR from 2020-2023, valued at USD 4.96 billion in 2023, expected to reach USD 8.83 billion by 2030.
news.summary: A new report on the Agri Natural Enemy Pest Control Market projects significant growth opportunities. The report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, predicts a steady increase in the market size, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.73% between 2020 and 2023. In 2023, the market was valued at USD 4.96 billion, and this figure is anticipated to surge to USD 8.83 billion by 2030. The report analyzes various control agents such as predators, parasitoids, and pathogens, along with their applications across different regions and countries.

news.headline: Global Telehealth and Telemedicine market is growing at a CAGR of 24.02%, valued at USD 113.28 Billion in 2023, expected to reach USD 462.19 Billion by 2030.
news.summary: A recent report on the Telehealth and Telemedicine Market projects significant growth opportunities in the industry. The global market demonstrated a notable CAGR of 24.02% from 2020 to 2023, reaching a value of USD 113.28 billion in 2023. Further growth is anticipated, with expectations that the market will reach USD 462.19 billion. The analysis covers various components including software, services, and hardware, along with different modes of delivery and applications. This information aims to provide valuable market insights and forecasts for the period 2020-2030.

news.headline: CES 2025 showcases potential of smart glasses like Ray-Ban Meta, marking future as prime computing platform.
news.summary: Participants and industry analysts attending CES 2025 anticipate that advanced eyewear like the Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses may emerge as a prominent computing platform in the near future. This new technology has captured the attention of tech firms seeking to capitalize on its potential.
